decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. 8/9 sessions consistent. Session 12 did not follow event-driven pattern.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 restructured preferences model for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 27/2605 lines reworked (1.0%, 37/50). 0/29 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 0.9% (15/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 64. Session 11: 54 (process:40 efficiency:10 ttfw:4). Session 12: 56 (process:40 efficiency:12 ttfw:4).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 187/187 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Adapters share interface: NotificationAdapter. 6/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
